name: Fey-Touched
description: Your exposure to the Feywild's magic grants you a +1 increase to Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. You learn the Misty Step spell and one 1st-level spell from the Divination or Enchantment school. You can cast each of these spells once without expending a spell slot per long rest, and you can also cast them using your spell slots. The spellcasting ability for these spells is the ability increased by this feat.
